log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Centaur — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+6=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Centaur — Winged Striker: FAIL! 40 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Centaur — Winged Striker --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Centaur — Winged Striker --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+6=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Centaur — Winged Striker --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Archmage (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:12+6=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Centaur — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Centaur — Winged Striker --- HP: 15/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (15/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Centaur — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Centaur — Winged Striker: FAIL! 31 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
